titleStmt.title: SII 24.66: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 66. (A.R. No. 130 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers the gift of a chauri (fly whisk) called Āyiravaṉ with a golden handle, to the god named as Ananta-Nārāyaṇasvāmi at Śrīraṅgam through the assembly of the village, by Malaiyāḷar of both Perundanam and Śiṟudanam. Mentions also the name of the person Śrīdānappiḷḷai-maṅgai-āḻvāṉ of the southern section (kaṇḍa) in the 16th chēri (ward) of Rājāśraya-charuppēdi maṅgalam appointed to serve the lord with the chauri. The record is dated in the 21st regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ vaḷara malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟa
n=ta maṇimuṭi cūṭi villavar kulaitara minavar nilaikeṭa vikkalar ciṅkaḷar melkaṭal pāyat tikkaṉaittu
n tan cakkaranaṭātti vijaiyaābhiṣekam paṇṇi virasiṅhāsanattup puvanamuḻu tuṭaiyāḷoṭu
viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakesaripanmarāna cakkaravattikaḷ śrīkolottuṅka coḻa tevarkku yā
ṇṭu 2 10 1vatu peruntanattum ciṟutanattum malaiyāḷarom tiruvaraṅkattup paḷḷi koṇṭaruḷu
kiṟa Anaṉtanārāyaṇasvāmikkup paṇimāṟukaikku nāṅkaḷ Eṅkaḷ perāl ma
�ṟkait tiruveṇcāmarai Onṟināl nāṅkaḷ Iṭṭuc ceyvitta pon A pon
5 10ø Itu cantirātittaval paṇimāṟukaikku Itu teñcālum I tiru
veṇcāmarai Iṭṭup paṇimāṟuvikkak kaṭavomāka sammatittu Irājama cuṟṟumā
ḷikaiyiley kalveṭṭivittom Iraṇṭu tanattu malaiyāḷarom ceyvikka
kaṭavomānom tiruvaraṅkattup peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom Itu rājāśrayaccarup
petimaṅkalattu patin Āṟāñcerit tenkaṇṭattu śrītānappiḷḷai maṅkai Āḻvānukku paṇimāṟa Iṭ
ṭa poṟkait tiruveṇcāmarai Oṉṟum Itu malaiyāḷar perāl Āyiravan Enpatu śrīvayiṣṇava(ra)rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 24.66 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
